name: immich-power-tools
tagline: A set of maintenance utilities for managing and migrating Immich libraries
description: Immich Power Tools is a collection of maintenance and migration utilities for Immich. It provides scripts and helpers for tasks like deduplication, importing and cleanup, intended for administrators of large photo libraries.

features.title: Immich Administration Tools
features.description: Perform maintenance and bulk operations on Immich libraries

features.title: Bulk Metadata Updates
features.description: Update metadata for multiple assets at once

features.title: Cleanup Operations
features.description: Identify and remove unused or duplicate assets

features.title: Command-Line Interface
features.description: Run administrative tasks using CLI commands

features.title: Immich Integration
features.description: Operate against an existing Immich server
